quote: You are not the body nor the mind. You are pure awareness — boundless and free.
A grieving mother asked Buddha to bring her dead child back. He sent her to find a mustard seed from a house where no one had died.
The ability to observe without evaluating is the highest form of intelligence.
Be — don't try to become. Becoming is the root of all anxiety.
Everything that has a beginning has an ending. Make your peace with that and all will be well.
You are already free. Why do you seek freedom?
When the observer is the observed there is no conflict. Conflict exists only when there is separation.
Awareness is the greatest agent for change. You cannot be angry and aware at the same time.
